授業目的: The role of marketing becomes, as well as many other management functions, much important these days, given the change in competitive surrounding, trade circumstance, and customer environment. The purpose of this course is to provide the basic and advanced knowledge and skill of marketing to the students via case-methods as used at Harvard Business School and lectures.
到達目標: This course, in terms of learning goals, aims to 1) provide a basic foundation to enable the student to understand and analyze marketing decisions by using case studies and 2) review existing literatures and theories in the field of i) marketing strategy, marketing management, ii) consumer behavior, and iii) marketing-mix strategies, such as product strategy, communication strategy, distribution-channel strategy, and pricing strategy.
授業の概要・背景:
In the first two sessions, the basics of marketing and B2B marketing are discussed. In the following sessions, each student is required to 1) carefully read the cases, given the questions (to be distributed in the first session), 2) submit a concise write-up (ONE page) as to the questions for each case before the beginning of the class, and 3) do (group) presentations on the application of the findings from the cases. The details of the course work are explained in the first session.

This course will be held on the following dates:
August 3 (Mon), Periods 1–4
August 5 (Wed), Periods 1–4
August 7 (Fri), Periods 1–4
August 8 (Sat), Periods 3–4
授業方法: All lectures are conducted completely face-to-face.

第2回:
B2B Marketing via Cases
Application of Implication of B2BCases
第3回:

Case: Kataoka & Co. Ltd. (A)
第4回:

第6回:

第7回:

Individual case reading and preparation for concise write-up at to the questions for "NTT West" case.
第8回:
Marketing Environment and Marketing Strategy 2
Application of Case Session 7
Self-study on Marketing Environment and Marketing Strategy.
第9回:

第10回:

第11回:

Individual case reading and preparation for concise write-up at to the questions for "Oji Nepia" case.
第12回:
Communication Strategy and Cause Related Marketing 2

第13回:

第14回:

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.

成績評価Grading2: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Not Attendance but Participation. Zero Evaluation for Absence.
